name: Applebees Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the water, sugar, and lemon juice together until the sugar is fully dissolved.
2. Fill a tall glass 2/3 to 3/4 full with the lemon mixture.
3. Top off the glass with sparkling water.
An interesting variation is to puree some fruit (raspberries, strawberries, etc.) with a little superfine or powdered sugar and add it to the glass before adding the lemonade and water.
